message:
Add 36 comprehensive real unit tests to input module

Tests pure functions without mocks:
- calculate_step: boundary conditions, interpolation, edge cases
- RotationProcessor: accumulation, bidirectional, multiplier, extremes
- ClickDetector: reset, state transitions, config updates
- ClickConfig/SensitivityConfig: defaults, conversions

Also documents a limitation in triple-click detection where
DoubleClick fires immediately and resets state, making
TripleClick unreachable in current implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
